message:
fix(drift): refuse auto-fix when tracked sources are dirty

Root-cause fix for the recurring CI breakage where Installer CI fails
with "Internal script integrity check failed: 2 file(s) modified."

The systemd timer (acfs-manifest-drift.timer, every 2h) runs
check-manifest-drift.sh --fix on this VPS. The script:

  1. Calls `bun run generate`, which hashes the SOURCE files (e.g.
     scripts/lib/*.sh, scripts/acfs-global, scripts/acfs-update)
     **as they currently are in the working tree**.
  2. Writes those hashes into scripts/generated/internal_checksums.sh.
  3. Commits and pushes ONLY scripts/generated/ — not the source files.

When another agent has uncommitted edits to one of those source files
in the same working tree, step 1 captures a hash that exists nowhere
on the remote. After step 3, origin/main has internal_checksums.sh
saying "scripts/acfs-global must hash to X" while the actual
origin/main copy of scripts/acfs-global hashes to Y. Every install.sh
run on a fresh checkout (i.e. all CI jobs and every real user) then
fails the integrity check — same failure mode that hit Pinned Ref
Smoke and the Test installer matrix on c55a89eb.

Refuse to fix when tracked source files (scripts/lib, scripts/acfs-*,
acfs.manifest.yaml, packages/manifest) have uncommitted changes. The
timer will simply retry on the next 2h cycle once the working tree
is clean. Untracked files (?? in git status) are still allowed.

files.patch:
@@ -471,6 +471,30 @@ if ! command -v bun &>/dev/null; then
     exit 2
 fi
 
+# Refuse to fix if any tracked source file (anything contributing to
+# ACFS_INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS or to the generated installer scripts) has
+# uncommitted changes. Otherwise `bun run generate` would hash the dirty
+# working-tree contents and we'd push checksums that don't match what's
+# actually committed — exactly the failure mode that broke Pinned Ref Smoke
+# and the offline bootstrap installer tests on c55a89eb.
+DIRTY_SOURCES="$(cd "$REPO_ROOT" && git status --porcelain -- \
+    scripts/lib \
+    scripts/acfs-global \
+    scripts/acfs-update \
+    acfs.manifest.yaml \
+    packages/manifest 2>/dev/null \
+    | grep -v '^??' || true)"
+if [[ -n "$DIRTY_SOURCES" ]]; then
+    log_error "Refusing to auto-fix: tracked source files have uncommitted changes."
+    log_error "Otherwise generated checksums would capture working-tree state and"
+    log_error "diverge from what's actually committed/pushed. Commit (or stash)"
+    log_error "these first, then re-run with --fix:"
+    while IFS= read -r _line; do
+        [[ -z "$_line" ]] || log_error "  $_line"
+    done <<< "$DIRTY_SOURCES"
+    exit 2
+fi
+
 # Regenerate
 cd "$REPO_ROOT/packages/manifest"
 if ! bun run generate >&2; then
